name: This Curse Is Metal as Hell! | Kusodeka Bayashi
short_description: This Curse Is Metal as Hell! is a first-person horror comedy game. As the game’s child protagonist, master the special powers hidden within your dad’s MP3 player to rush your way through a world of pure terror. Do you have what it takes to defeat the curse that plagued your family for generations?
detailed_description:
This Curse Is Metal as Hell! | Kusodeka Bayashi is a first-person horror comedy game where you take on the role of a young child who must confront the horrific entity assaulting his grandparents’ countryside residence.

Story

You’ve gone to stay at your grandma and grandpa’s house on the countryside so your mom can give birth to her baby in peace. Surrounded by such beautiful nature, Sodehiki Village is the perfect place to take a load off and relax... Or at least it was supposed to be.

An overwhelmingly menacing aura awaits you upon your arrival. Eerie statues line the town. Burly men dressed from head to toe in leather absolutely ruin the village’s quaint and charming atmosphere. And to top it all off, there’s a local faith in an evil god that has some deep connection with your family...

“Oh man! A family curse? An evil mountain god? Give me a frickin’ break!”

Will you ever be able to get to that slow-paced lifestyle you’ve been looking forward to in this quaint country village?!

Game Details

An action adventure game where you search the environment from a first-person perspective.

As you unveil the truth behind the hidden curse that has plagued your family for generations, you must search for a way to fight back.

Play Time: About 1-1.5 hours
Endings: 1

Regarding Playthroughs and Streaming

Thank you for playing this HAZECODE game. I’ve established some guidelines for playthroughs and streaming so that more people can know about and enjoy this title. Please follow the guidelines below when filming or livestreaming any gameplay videos for this title. If you would like to film or stream gameplay, there is no need to contact me, regardless of whether you are an individual or an organization.

  • Please include the URL for this page in the video-sharing platform’s description box.

  • Monetization provided by video-sharing platforms (such as advertising revenue and donations) is permitted.

  • The recording and uploading of the music used in the game separate from gameplay to websites such as video-sharing platforms is prohibited.

  • The recording and streaming of game commentaries that include slander and/or content that is contrary to public order or morality is prohibited.

  • Please note that HAZECODE bears no responsibility for any trouble that arises in relation to game commentaries or streaming.

  • These terms may change at any time without prior notice and the altered terms will apply to any game commentary videos that were filmed or streamed after the change.
